title: telanthera echinocephala var. robustior
side_effects: Telanthera echinocephala var. robustior can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal issues, including nausea and vomiting, as well as allergic reactions like skin irritation and respiratory problems. In severe cases, excessive consumption can lead to kidney damage and electrolyte imbalances. Additionally, improper use of this plant may cause interactions with other medications, potentially exacerbating conditions like high blood pressure and heart disease. It is crucial to consult a medical professional before using Telanthera echinocephala var. robustior for any health benefits to avoid these potential side effects.
